Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Users Request Input A scenario describing a product design and launch process with 10 specific activities IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL Task Construct a Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model for this scenario Format Requirements The dictionary must contain specific keys

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Process Flow Logical Deduction need to infer reasonable declarative constraints based on the scenario description A typical product design launch process follows a logical sequence 1 IG must happen first 2 DD follows IG 3 TFC and CE might happen in parallel or after DD 4 PC happens after design is approved feasible 5 LT and UT happen after PC 6 AG happens after testing or in parallel with planning 7 MP happens before FL 8 FL is the final step

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Constraint Generation Mental Mapping to DECLARE types existence Every activity must occur at least once init IG is the first activity responded existence If IG happens DD happens response If IG happens DD must happen precedence DD must precede PC succession DD must be succeeded by PC altresponse If TFC happens LT must happen chainresponse If PC happens LT must happen immediately coexistence AG and FL must both occur nonsuccession FL cannot be immediately followed by anything

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets systematically map constraints to the required keys existence All activities occur at least once absence No activity is absent exactly one Not applicable init IG responded existence If IG happens DD happens coexistence AG and MP must both occur response DD PC precedence PC FL succession PC FL altresponse TFC UT altprecedence CE precedes AG altsuccession CE AG chainresponse PC LT chainprecedence LT UT chainsuccession LT UT noncoexistence not applicable nonsuccession FL nonchainsuccession empty

Name: Validation - PE
Text: verify the logical flow against the scenario IG starts init IG IG triggers DD responded existence IG DD must lead to PC response DD TFC triggers LT altresponse TFC CE must precede AG altprecedence CE PC immediately followed by LT chainresponse PC AG and MP both occur coexistence AG MP FL is never followed by anything nonsuccession FL All activities exist existence all

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Refinement during thought The prompt says For the keys existence absence exactly one init the value is a dictionary containing as keys the activities Actually existence absence exactly one in pm4py are unary constraints init is also unary The others are binary constraints source activity to the tuple

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: refine the constraints structure declare model existence all activities absence exactly one init IG responded existence IG coexistence AG MP response DD precedence DD succession DD altresponse TFC altprecedence CE altsuccession CE chainresponse PC chainprecedence PC chainsuccession PC nonsuccession FL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check of the prompt keys exactly match Lets double check the exact key names from the prompt All match note that in a real world scenario support and confidence would be derived from event logs but here they are set to 1 0 as per the prompt example All good Proceed
